title: Frontend-Backend Communication Architecture
consumer_purpose: Map how packages/app/ communicates with packages/opencode/
claim_atoms: HTTP REST via auto-generated SDK client
Electron window.api bridge for native features
TanStack Solid Query for HTTP caching
Event coalescing and batching on SSE stream
content:
## Frontend-Backend Communication Architecture

### 1. Entry Points & Dependency Chain
- **packages/app (SolidJS frontend)**: entry.tsx → app.tsx → router → pages
- **packages/opencode (server/backend)**: server.ts → HttpApiApp → route groups
- **packages/sdk/js (shared SDK)**: auto-generated @opencode-ai/sdk from OpenAPI spec

### 2. Four Communication Channels

#### Channel 1: HTTP REST via SDK Client (Primary Data Channel)
- Auto-generated from OpenAPI spec via @hey-api/openapi-ts
- SDK: `@opencode-ai/sdk/v2/client` → `createOpencodeClient()`
- Wraps `fetch()` with: x-opencode-directory header → query param rewrite, Basic auth
- Used via `@tanstack/solid-query` for caching/dedup

#### Channel 2: Server-Sent Events (SSE) (Real-Time Channel)
- Endpoint: `GET /global/event` (text/event-stream)
- Managed by: `packages/app/src/context/server-sdk.tsx`
- Heartbeat: 15s timeout, auto-reconnect (250ms delay)
- Batching: 16ms animation frame coalescing
- Per-directory event filtering via createGlobalEmitter

#### Channel 3: WebSocket (PTY/Terminal Only)
- Endpoint: `ws://host/pty/:id/connect`
- Used exclusively for terminal session I/O

#### Channel 4: Electron IPC Bridge (Desktop Only)
- `window.api.*` interface for native capabilities
- Fallback HTTP fetch for browser mode
- Covers: git status, deps, session memory, test status, PR activity

### 3. Context Provider Hierarchy
- PlatformProvider → LanguageProvider → SettingsProvider → ServerProvider → ServersProvider → ServerSDKProvider → ServerSyncProvider → SDKProvider + ...

### 4. HTTP API Route Groups
- **Global**: /global/health, /global/event (SSE), /global/config (GET/PATCH), /global/dispose, /global/upgrade
- **Session**: /session (CRUD + messages, parts, prompt, command, shell, fork, revert, permissions)
- **Instance**: /instance (dispose, path, vcs, command, agent, skill, lsp, formatter)
- **Config**: /config (GET/PATCH + /config/providers)
- **Provider**: /provider (list, auth, oauth flows)
- **V2**: /api/session, /api/model, /api/provider
- **Experimental**: /experimental (console, tools, worktree, session, resource)
- Besides: file, find, mcp, pty, permission, question, command, auth, tui, event, sync

### 5. Key Data Flow: SSE → State
- SSE stream → server-sdk.tsx (coalesce/batch) → createGlobalEmitter
- → server-sync.tsx (applyGlobalEvent/applyDirectoryEvent) → SolidJS stores
- → TanStack Query cache invalidation + UI reactivity

### 6. Per-Directory State Isolation
- createChildStoreManager: lazy per-directory stores, up to 30, LRU eviction (20min idle)
- Each directory has own: sessions, messages, parts, permissions, questions, VCS, MCP, LSP state

### 7. Coordination Events
- Custom SSE types: coordination.session_heartbeat, coordination.task_status, coordination.path_claimed, coordination.activity_logged
- Used by session-viz.tsx for multi-agent visualization

### 8. Connection Resilience
- Auto-reconnect: SSE on failure (250ms)
- Heartbeat timeout: 15s → abort + reconnect
- Visibility change: reconnect on tab focus if stale
- Backpressure: refresh queue processes 2 dirs at a time
